title: Substack vs Benchmark Email (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs Benchmark Email: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Substack vs Benchmark Email: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Substack and Benchmark Email comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Benchmark Email targets small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting An Easy-To-Use Email Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform

faq.q: Is Substack better than Benchmark Email?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Benchmark Email is stronger for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or Benchmark Email?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Benchmark Email to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
